outlook.summary: The market structure is heavily dominated by positive Total GEX (4.24B), indicating extreme dealer long gamma. This suppresses volatility and favors mean-reversion or tight range-bound trading. The 600-610 zone acts as a magnetic pinning range due to massive open interest, overriding the slight bearish skew sentiment. Expect strict containment between structural support and calls walls.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call Open Interest (17.5k in 0DTE, 19.2k in Monthly) combined with extreme volume (40k+ in 0DTE). Acts as an absolute ceiling for the current session.

Significant Put OI in Weekly (9.4k) and Monthly (29.3k). Coincides with the Monthly Max Pain level, ensuring strong dealer defense.
0DTE Gamma Flip is at 585.06, and both 0DTE and Weekly Max Pain align precisely at 585/586. Shifts market structure from positive to negative gamma below here.
Heavy Monthly Call OI (30k) acting as a structural ceiling for the wider weekly timeframe if 610 is breached.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to massive positive GEX across all expiries, favoring range-bound price action.
outlook.summary: Market shows massive positive GEX (1.44B in 0DTE alone), indicating dealers are heavily long gamma, which suppresses volatility and stabilizes the market near current levels. 0DTE volatility skew is bearish (smirk), but positive gamma dominates the structural outlook. Spot is trapped directly beneath a heavy 0DTE Call Volume resistance band between 25100 and 25300. The ultimate structural floor is anchored at 24000, aligning across all expirations.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put OI across 0DTE, WEEKLY, and MONTHLY, combined with 0DTE Gamma Flip and Max Pain. Acts as ultimate structural support.
Significant Call OI in both 0DTE and MONTHLY, highlighted by extremely heavy 0DTE volume (573). Primary upper resistance.
Dominant Call OI in 0DTE and WEEKLY expirations, confirming the upper boundary of the resistance cluster.
Intense 0DTE Call volume (395) and OI (153) creating immediate friction and magnetic price attraction right above spot.
Largest Call OI in the MONTHLY expiry (4028). Creates strong gravity pull below the 24000 support level.
High 0DTE Call volume (520) creating a local gravity point at the edge of the current spot price.
